obj_noellehouse_festival_slash_Step_0_gm: \E7* ..^1. he said..^1. what?/%

* I don't have any friends named that./%

\EB* What the-- what the hell?!/
\EC* How does HE deserve HER!?/
\ED* I like..^1. God^1, I should've like.../

\ED* She should have like^1, MY standards^1, too!^1? Damnit!/%
\E9* Woah^1, the enemy alligator girl was his girlfriend?!/
\E2* OMG!!^1! Way to go enemy alligator girl!!/
\E6* I never thought ANYONE would like her!^1! LOL/%

obj_npc_cafe_slash_Other_10_gml_27_0_b: * Pretty sure this is completely Rouxls's fault./%

obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_50_: \E0* So^1, Sir Swatch steppedeth out for a moment.../
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_51_: \E3* And^1, so I..^1. perhapseth..^1. as a Favore.../
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_52_: \E4* Takingeth over for him^1, while he was Gone.../
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_53_: \E3* And while he was Not Noticinge me doingeth so.../
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_56_: \E1* Okay^1, guyse^1. I will be-eth "Reale" withst you Here./
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_57_: \E6* Any Recruitse you made at yon Churche.../
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_58_: \E4* They Basicallye haven'tst seen anything besides This before./
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_59_: \E3* To them^1, this is Normale^1. So it's all coole./
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_60_: \E6* No one will findeth out^1. No one notices..^1. everyone loveths me.../
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_61_: \E5* Just..^1. helpeth me cleane up before Swatch gets back./%
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_65_: \E5* Oh^1, something HAPPENEDE^1? No^1, no^1, NOTHINGE happeneds?/
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_67_: \E2* None of the recruits will suspecteth a thinge...?/%
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_105: \E3* For yon blue person^1, I recommendeth..^1. the worm Soupe./%
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_109: \E3* For yon purpleth girl^1, I recommendeth..^1. using Detergente./%
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_113: \E6* For yon green bimbitoe^1, I recommendeth..^1. a more than $5 haircut./%
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_117: \E6* For yon festive ewe^1, I recommendeth..^1. helpingeth me fix the ice cream machine./%
obj_npc_castle_cafe_slash_Step_0_gml_145: * (It's an ice cream machine^1. It's broken.)/
obj_npc_castle_cliff_slash_Step_0_gml_22: * Wonder if Susie'll need'n some pine fragrance for her shindig?/
obj_npc_castle_cliff_slash_Step_0_gml_23: * Y'know^1, somethin' to mask'n that earthy smell./%
obj_npc_castle_cliff_slash_Step_0_gml_34: * My nostrils^1, which many are mistak'n for my eyes^1, know just what'n'll help ya./%
obj_npc_castle_cliff_slash_Step_0_gml_47: * Yes'n^1, that small tree's composed of my finest pinest./
obj_npc_castle_cliff_slash_Step_0_gml_48: * Stick'm in your clothes'n pockets^1, that holiday gal'll make ya her holiday pal./%

obj_npc_castle_cliff_slash_Step_0_gml_61: * I'm hoping if he spies this bit o' farmland^1, he'll come back and visit.../%
obj_npc_castle_cliff_slash_Step_0_gml_83: * (A blue hole^1. What could it contain?)/
obj_npc_castle_door_slash_Step_0_gml_14_: * (A little ball turned out to be stronger than you could expect.)/
obj_npc_castle_door_slash_Step_0_gml_29_: * I'm tired of not getting the respect I deserve^1, a-hyuck!/
obj_npc_castle_door_slash_Step_0_gml_30_: * Next time you call me garbage^1, you'll mean it in the good way!/%
obj_npc_castle_door_slash_Step_0_gml_44_: * Nubert's seen you work hard^1. We both moved up in the world./
obj_npc_castle_door_slash_Step_0_gml_45_: * Now it's time to see who will be on top..^1. of that world./
obj_npc_castle_door_slash_Step_0_gml_46_: * I'll see you in ..^1. the dojo./%
obj_npc_castle_door_slash_Step_0_gml_69_: * No I don't know why they disappeared^1. Its scary./%
